message:
fix(clusters): stabilize RenameModal close-animation test (#8952) (#8964)

The #8927 regression test was added by PR #8931 using hardcoded English
button labels ('Rename', 'Renamed'). PR #8932 (i18n refactor) then
migrated RenameModal.tsx to use t() translation keys and updated the
other tests in the file, but missed this test because the two PRs
rebased through each other.

Switched the three label assertions to the translation keys
('cluster.renameContext.rename' / '.renamed'), matching the pattern
already used by the rest of this file (the useTranslation mock returns
each key verbatim).

Fixes #8952

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
